# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    host: users-upstream
    port: 8080
    protocol: http
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - users
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/users
          - /api/v1/users/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        path_handling: v0
        tags:
          - production
          - users
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 300
          hour: 10000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - X-Forwarded-Service:users-service

  - name: orders-service
    host: orders-upstream
    port: 8080
    protocol: http
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - orders
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/orders
          - /api/v1/orders/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        path_handling: v0
        tags:
          - production
          - orders
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 200
          hour: 5000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - X-Forwarded-Service:orders-service

  - name: inventory-service
    host: inventory-upstream
    port: 8080
    protocol: http
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - inventory
    routes:
      - name: inventory-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/inventory
          - /api/v1/inventory/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        path_handling: v0
        tags:
          - production
          - inventory
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 500
          hour: 15000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - X-Forwarded-Service:inventory-service

  - name: payments-service
    host: payments-upstream
    port: 8080
    protocol: http
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - payments
    routes:
      - name: payments-route
        protocols:
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payments
          - /api/v1/payments/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        path_handling: v0
        tags:
          - production
          - payments
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 100
          hour: 2000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - X-Forwarded-Service:payments-service

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: users-service-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-service-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: orders-service-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: orders-service-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: inventory-upstream
    algorithm: least-connections
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: inventory-service-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: inventory-service-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: payments-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
    targets:
      - target: payments-service-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: payments-service-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-Correlation-Id
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Correlation-Id
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  - name: correlation-id
    config:
      header_name: X-Correlation-Id
      generator: uuid
      echo_downstream: true

  - name: prometheus

  - name: file-log
    config:
      path: /var/log/kong/access.log
      reopen: true

  - name: response-transformer
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - X-API-Gateway:Kong
          - X-Environment:production
